# WorldOfTaxonomy - Full Reference

> Unified global classification knowledge graph.
> 1,000+ systems, 1.2M+ nodes, 321K+ crosswalk edges.
> Open source (MIT license). Data provided for informational purposes only - use at your own risk.

## Categories (16)

1. Industry - NAICS, ISIC, NACE, SIC, NIC, ANZSIC, and 170+ national systems
2. Health / Clinical - ICD-10-CM, ICD-11, LOINC, MeSH, NCI Thesaurus, ATC, NDC
3. Product / Trade - HS, CPC, UNSPSC, PRODCOM, TARIC, Schedule B
4. Occupational - SOC, ISCO, ESCO, O*NET, ANZSCO, NOC, ROME
5. Education - CIP, ISCED, ISCED-F
6. Financial / Investment - GICS, ICB, SASB SICS, EU Taxonomy, Basel
7. Geographic - ISO 3166-1/2, UN M.49, EU NUTS, US FIPS
8. Regulatory & Governance - HIPAA, SOX, GDPR, CCPA, PCI DSS, NIST, CMMC, and 70+ frameworks
9. ISO Standards - ISO 9001, 14001, 27001, 42001, and 20+ management system standards
10. International Treaties - Basel III, FATF, ILO, WTO, Paris Agreement, and 15+ treaties
11. Research & Knowledge - arXiv, JEL, MSC, LCC, LCSH, Scopus ASJC
12. Environmental & Earth Sciences - IUCN, CITES, Ramsar, Stockholm Convention
13. Technology Standards - IETF, W3C, IEEE, USB, Bluetooth, 3GPP
14. Scales & Reference - SI Units, Periodic Table, Beaufort Scale, BMI, APGAR
15. Transport & Logistics - IATA, IMO, ICAO, FAA, UIC
16. Domain Taxonomies - 400+ sector-specific vocabularies across 49 industry sectors

## API Reference

Base URL: https://worldoftaxonomy.com/api/v1
Content-Type: application/json

### Systems

GET /systems
  Returns: Array of { id, name, full_name, region, node_count, ... }
  Example: curl https://worldoftaxonomy.com/api/v1/systems

GET /systems/{id}
  Returns: System detail with root nodes
  Example: curl https://worldoftaxonomy.com/api/v1/systems/naics_2022

### Nodes

GET /systems/{id}/nodes/{code}
  Returns: { code, title, description, level, parent_code, is_leaf, ... }
  Example: curl https://worldoftaxonomy.com/api/v1/systems/naics_2022/nodes/5112

GET /systems/{id}/nodes/{code}/children
  Returns: Array of child nodes
  Example: curl https://worldoftaxonomy.com/api/v1/systems/naics_2022/nodes/51/children

GET /systems/{id}/nodes/{code}/ancestors
  Returns: Array of ancestor nodes from root to parent
  Example: curl https://worldoftaxonomy.com/api/v1/systems/naics_2022/nodes/511210/ancestors

### Cross-system Mappings

GET /systems/{id}/nodes/{code}/equivalences
  Returns: Array of { target_system, target_code, target_title, match_type }
  match_type: "exact" | "partial" | "broad" | "narrow"
  Example: curl https://worldoftaxonomy.com/api/v1/systems/naics_2022/nodes/5112/equivalences

GET /equivalences/stats
  Returns: Array of { source_system, target_system, edge_count, exact_count }

### Search

GET /search?q={query}&system={id}&limit={n}&context=true
  Full-text search across all systems (or filtered to one)
  context=true includes ancestor path for each match
  Example: curl "https://worldoftaxonomy.com/api/v1/search?q=software+publishing&limit=10"

### Classify (Pro+ tier)

POST /classify
  Body: { "text": "organic baby food manufacturer", "systems": ["naics_2022"], "limit": 5 }
  Returns: Matched codes per system with relevance scores
  Requires: Pro or Enterprise tier API key

### Countries

GET /countries/stats
  Returns: Per-country taxonomy coverage statistics

GET /countries/{code}
  Returns: Country taxonomy profile with official/recommended systems and sector strengths
  Example: curl https://worldoftaxonomy.com/api/v1/countries/US

### Authentication

POST /auth/register - Create account (email, password)
POST /auth/login - Get JWT token (15 min expiry)
POST /auth/keys - Create long-lived API key (wot_ prefix)

Header: Authorization: Bearer <jwt_or_api_key>

### Rate Limits

| Tier       | Per Minute | Daily   | Classify |
|------------|-----------|---------|----------|
| Anonymous  | 30        | 1,000   | No       |
| Free       | 100       | 5,000   | 10/day   |
| Pro        | 1,000     | 100,000 | 1,000/day|
| Enterprise | 10,000    | Unlimited| Unlimited|

## MCP Server Tools

Transport: stdio (JSON-RPC)
Run: python3 -m world_of_taxonomy mcp

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| list_classification_systems | List all systems with node counts |
| get_industry | Fetch a code by system + code |
| search_classifications | Full-text search across all nodes |
| browse_children | Navigate hierarchy downward |
| get_ancestors | Get full path to root |
| get_equivalences | Get crosswalk edges for a code |
| translate_code | Convert code between two systems |
| translate_across_all_systems | Translate to every linked system |
| classify_business | Classify free-text against all systems |
| get_country_taxonomy_profile | Full taxonomy profile for a country |
| explore_industry_tree | Step-by-step hierarchy exploration |
| get_sector_overview | Summary stats for a sector |
| compare_sector | Compare sector across systems |
| find_by_keyword_all_systems | Search in every system |
| get_crosswalk_coverage | Edge counts between system pairs |
| get_system_diff | Structural diff of two systems |
| get_siblings | Sibling codes at same level |
| get_subtree_summary | Count nodes under a parent |
| resolve_ambiguous_code | Disambiguate multi-system codes |
| get_leaf_count | Count leaf nodes in subtree |
| get_region_mapping | Map region to its systems |
| describe_match_types | Explain crosswalk match qualities |

## Data Provenance

Every system has a data_provenance field:
- official_download: Parsed from official source files (highest trust)
- structural_derivation: National system that adopts an international standard verbatim
- manual_transcription: Transcribed from official documentation
- expert_curated: Domain expert-assembled vocabulary

Every official_download system includes a source_file_hash (SHA-256) for audit verification.

## Disclaimer

Data is provided for informational purposes only. We do not guarantee accuracy
or completeness. Use at your own risk. For authoritative codes, consult the
official source. Report data issues at:
https://github.com/colaberry/WorldOfTaxonomy/issues/new?template=data_issue.yml
